titles.title: I Could Sing of Your Love

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Over the mountains and the sea Your river runs with love for me. And I will open up my heart and let the healer set me free. I’m happy to be in the truth and I will daily lift my hands. For I will always sing of when Your love came down.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I could sing of your love forever I could sing of your love forever I could sing of your love forever I could sing of your love forever

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh I feel like dancing, it’s foolishness I know. But when the world has seen the light, they will dance with joy like we’re dancing now.
